reasoning: The target is a FIDE Elo rating at least 1% higher than his baseline rating on 2025-10-26. If the Wikipedia page remains outdated showing 2794.000, achieving a 1% increase requires reaching an Elo around 2822, which is nearly impossible for Gukesh given his present form. If the Wikipedia page is updated before October 26 to reflect his current true October 2025 FIDE rating of 2752, achieving a 1% increase would require reaching roughly 2780 Elo. His rating won't increase for the November 2025 timeframe because he did not have classical results during October to push it up. For the January 2026 list, he would need to gain roughly 28 Elo points primarily through the FIDE World Cup starting in November. Such a large rating gain at the super-GM level within a single event is feasible but highly improbable, especially given his recent severe slump. Lastly, updates to the Wikipedia rankings page could incur lags, further minimizing the chances.
